name: golang-github-rcrowley-go-metrics-dev
title: golang-github-rcrowley-go-metrics-dev
summary: Application level metrics capturing library for Go
description:
Application level metrics capturing library for Go
go-metrics supports counters, gauges and histograms.
.
The metrics can be published to various destinations (e.g. Graphite, InfluxDB,
Prometheus) using external client libraries.
.
Port of the https://github.com/dropwizard/metrics library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-rcrowley-go-metrics-dev because Application level metrics capturing library for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-rcrowley-go-metrics-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-rcrowley-go-metrics-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-rcrowley-go-metrics-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
